reach_why: Mostly reiterates known critiques of explanation, evaluation bias, and correlated model failures; little genuinely new territory.
novelty_why: Combines familiar AI-evaluation worries with formal propositions, highlighting fallibilist limits of layered safeguards.
falsifiable_why: Claims can be challenged by counterexamples, empirical tests of critic independence, or stronger definitions of explanation.
explanation: Layered LLM evaluation can look rigorous yet miss shared blind spots and suppress unconventional explanations.
